title: OSINT Seed — Public Profile, Career, and Network
summary: Initial seed data for Manuel Adorni investigation. CUIT 20-28052206-7. 13 persons and 9 organizations ingested into Neo4j with 22 relationships. MiroFish assessed risk level as HIGH based on 8 key findings: private flights paid by contractor, undeclared assets (500% patrimony increase), wife's triangulated state contracts, Tecnopolis conflict of interest, simulated SMS tender competition, LIBRA scandal connection, unexplained cash, and extreme income-spending gap.

mirofish_verification.factcheck_notes: MiroFish incorrectly referred to Karina Milei as 'Vice President' — she is Secretary General of the Presidency. All other findings verified against source URLs.

key_findings: CUIT: 20-28052206-7 (gold tier, from AFIP via CuitOnline)
AFIP activities: personal services (2013), business advisory (2020), accounting (2020)
Company: AS Innovacion Profesional SRL — 50/50 with wife (Boletin Oficial source)
Career: UNLP Economics → UADE CPA → media commentator → Macri Culture Min (2017) → LLA Spokesperson (2023) → Jefe Gabinete (2025)
Private flights: Punta del Este Feb 2026, paid by Imhouse S.A. ($6.98M ARS). Judge Lijo investigating.
Undeclared assets: Country house Indio Cua (wife, Nov 2024), Caballito apartment. 500% patrimony increase 2023-2024.
Wife contracts: +Be consulting with YPF, AySA, Banco Nacion, Aerolineas, ARCA via triangulation.
SMS tender: $3.65B ARS to ATX S.A. with alleged simulated competition.
LIBRA connection: Attended Hotel Libertador meeting (Oct 2024) with Milei, Karina, Novelli, Peh.
Income gap: Salary $3.5M/month vs family spending $17-20M/month on credit cards.
